When you get one of ryker's relics, you get 1 extra relic space

Ryker will give you 3 relics called "Legacy of Chaos"
each time he gives you one, your relic cap +1
because his relic will take 1 slot so the cap will be expanded

directly offer my flesh, my life i offer everything that (cant read) for a blessing for shine children
Merciful Maker, I hereby offer my flesh, my blood, my life. I offer everything that thou hast give for a Blessing for thine children.

Like these texts on Salvador’s banner
Question, I just reached lv 45 and able to enchance my convent. Is there a way to tell which main stat I want for a specific character? and is it worth lving them to max lv 12?
you want crit rate for those who wants (crit rate and crit dmg) for most DPS

Yeah, I figured. I think my question is a bit vague, let me ask abit more specific. For like Salvador, as a dps, how much crit rate should i aim for? I also know his passive scales with black sigil drop %, but is that worth investing in?
each character is mostly built on a certain stats for their "card skills" or "Talents"
I mean, most crit rate will come from relic anyway
he will also give himself crit rate when devour is triggered
the desired crit rate is ofc 100%
but like... you can't get much from pizza
the maximum crit rate you can get from pizza is about (1.6x3x6)+(4x3)
each requires you to adjust your substats with 3 crit rate at maximum value, which is almost impossible
I don't think I have access to sub stat atm
getting 1 desired substats at maximum value is already hard, let alone 3
I guess I should go for black sigil drop main stat
The other thing I can do
Thais devour with salvador will give me 50% critical rate
raw eating an embyro also gives 10% as well
I use the ticket to pick up Thais
But i think I can't get the convent set I needed atm
if you want to build dmg for him
but Paradox will require your account lv at 62
yeah, I see most go for paradox
if you dont need crit rate
what about Thais? which one do you go for?

or another set, I dont remember
